name: Jellyfin Visual Home
description: Modern visual home sections for Jellyfin Web using only local Jellyfin library data.
overview: Adds configurable hero, carousel, top 10, studio, genre, family, horror, short movie and recommendation sections without modifying Jellyfin Web files.

versions.changelog: Add explicit reversible Jellyfin Web index.html JavaScript installer for environments where automatic middleware injection is unavailable.
